chapterTitle: Chapter I: The Poison Beneath the Crown

events.title: The King is poisoned
events.description: During the feast celebrating the hatching of the dragon eggs, King Baelenys is poisoned. The Red Keep is placed under lockdown while he clings to life.

events.title: Three dragons hatch for one prince
events.description: Prince Visenor's single egg produces three hatchlings, sparking the first open dispute between the royal siblings over who should claim them.

events.title: "The Hand"
events.description: Gaelor tortures a confession out of the suspected poisoner, who names the Hand of the King with his dying breath before Gaelor silences him for good.

events.title: Rhaella's secret letter
events.description: A hidden letter reveals that Rhaella has been secretly writing to her exiled family beyond the realm's borders, casting suspicion on Visenor's marriage.

chapterTitle: Chapter II: The Price of Trust

events.title: Blackfyre changes hands
events.description: King Baelenys strips Blackfyre from Visenor before the entire court and gives it to Gaelor, striking his heir bloody in a fit of rage.

events.title: Visenor's escape
events.description: Rather than kill Rhaella to regain his father's trust, Visenor flees King's Landing with her under cover of night, escorted by Ser Alester Dayne.

events.title: The Hand's confession
events.description: Jace confronts Derrin Hightower alone at Driftmark, extracts his confession of treason with House Highgarden, and executes him in secret, hiding the body at sea.

events.title: A wedding and a new Hand
events.description: Gaelor marries Naella Velaryon at Driftmark, and Queen Jaery pins the Hand's badge to Jacaelon's chest before the court.

chapterTitle: Chapter III: The Weight of Loyalty

events.title: The Iron Bank confirms the truth
events.description: A raven from Braavos confirms that the accounts financing the poisoning trace directly back to Derrin Hightower, implicating House Tyrell as well.

events.title: Ambush in the Dornish woods
events.description: Curtass Whent and five hired sellswords corner Ser Alester Dayne while he escorts Visenor and Rhaella south. Alester survives; none of his attackers do.

events.title: Sanctuary at Starfall
events.description: Lorenah Dayne shelters the fugitive Visenor and Rhaella at Starfall, fully aware of the danger it poses to her own house.

events.title: The march on the Reach begins
events.description: With the Iron Bank's records in hand, King Baelenys sends Gaelor to Highgarden and Oldtown to answer for the conspiracy in blood. The army departs King's Landing.

events.title: Saera's visit to Winterfell
events.description: Sent to offer the Crown's condolences on Lord Brandon Stark's death, Saera meets the new Lord of Winterfell, Rickard Stark, and lingers far longer than expected.

chapterTitle: Chapter V: Fathers and Their Sins

events.title: The Oldtown Massacre
events.description: After a two-month march, Gaelor executes young Lord Timos Hightower when the boy panics and draws steel. Ser Costayne calls the Hightower banners, and the ensuing slaughter kills every Oldtown knight present, along with Timos's sister Alysanne.

events.title: Maela at Storm's End
events.description: Princess Maela visits Storm's End as a marriage prospect for Steffon Baratheon, but seduces her own sworn shield, Ser Brannyn Vance, instead.

events.title: Baelor's return
events.description: Uncle Baelor Targaryen arrives from Oldtown's outskirts to learn the Oldtown Massacre has already happened, and rides for King's Landing in alarm.

chapterTitle: Chapter VI: A Crown of Thorns

events.title: The family fractures
events.description: News of Alysanne Hightower's death alongside Timos reaches King's Landing as Gaelor's host returns. Saera confronts King Baelenys, and a drunken Baelenys draws Blackfyre on Jace and Gaelor before Vhaemys's plea breaks the standoff.

events.title: Baelor named Grand Maester
events.description: King Baelenys elevates his uncle Baelor to Grand Maester in place of Cordin, though the two clash immediately over the King's handling of the Oldtown Massacre.

events.title: Rhaella's pregnancy and the legend of Boneskin
events.description: Hidden at a Dornish scholars' retreat outside Starfall, Visenor learns Rhaella is with child and discovers old letters referencing a reclusive, unusually intelligent dragon named Boneskin roosting in the Red Mountains.

events.title: Lady Dayne's envoy reaches King's Landing
events.description: Lady Lorenah Dayne's diplomatic envoy arrives at the Red Keep with a battered Ser Alester, who kneels in silent loyalty before Jace in the castle yard.

chapterTitle: Chapter VII: The Climb and the Kneel

events.title: Curtass Whent confirmed dead
events.description: Word reaches King's Landing that Ser Curtass Whent died in the Dornish woods carrying out the King's order to retrieve Visenor. King Baelenys shows only indifference.

events.title: A night in Flea Bottom
events.description: Jace and Lady Lorenah Dayne slip into Flea Bottom in disguise, wandering the city together for an evening away from court.

events.title: Jace is knighted
events.description: In private, with no court or ceremony, Ser Alester Dayne knights Jace, fulfilling a vow only the two of them witness.

events.title: Naella's pregnancy
events.description: Naella Velaryon tells Gaelor she is with child; King Baelenys receives the news with rare, genuine warmth.

events.title: Visenor tames Boneskin
events.description: Disguised and traveling alone from Starfall, Visenor climbs into the Red Mountains, tracks down the wild dragon Boneskin, and, after days of patient contact, wins the beast's trust.
